title: Emissive Zinc for Create
description: Makes the Create zinc ore and the raw zinc block glow.
body:
A simple resource pack that makes [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)'s Zinc ores emissive for a better experience when searching for them in mines.
### Notice:
Since this is an emissive textures pack, strictily requires **Optifine** (Forge) or **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)** (Fabric) to work.
